title: Sylvan Knowledge Curator final wind-down
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: temporary Knowledge Curator continuation.
- Outcome: wind-down only. I re-grounded, noticed Shaded owns the active main-register/napkin-tail curator lane, opened a narrow non-overlap legacy-shard claim, then owner directed immediate wind-down before any shard edit. No new curation content was processed or archived in this resume.
- Evidence: claim fc9c8bd5 closed immediately with no file edits under it; latest observed strict-hard before this wind-down remained HARD from pending-graduations.md after later team edits.
- Claims / queue / git state: no new Sylvan curation claim remains from this resume. Existing retained identity-helper source/test claim fbfeedb5 remains the marshal-ready source bundle from the prior handoff. No Sylvan commit queue entry.
- Surprise or changed understanding: none added; stopping at owner boundary.
- Blockers or risks: active curation remains unfinished by objective; Shaded has the live claimed curator lane.
- Handoff needed: active curator/Director can continue from current claims and current repo state.
